ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the transaction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the transaction */,
  "global_tid" TEXT /* Global transaction identifier for correlation */,
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Correlation identifier for identifying related transactions */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the name/type of operation */,
  "return_value" INTEGER /* Return value indicating the outcome of the transaction */,
  "application_instance_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the application instance that generated the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., SUCCESS, FAILED, IN_PROGRESS) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the transaction fails */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Duration of the transaction (computed as end_time - start_time) */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_correlation_id FOREIGN KEY ("correlation_id") REFERENCES correlation_ids ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES operation_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation name */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the operation being logged */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the operation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the operation (e.g., INGESTION, PROCESSING, EXPORT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_ids" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation purpose or context */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system or service that generated the correlation ID */,
  "source_system_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from the source system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id")
)
